question: Which social media platform is best for reaching professionals, business owners, and job seekers?
options: Snapchat
Pinterest
LinkedIn
Instagram

question: Which metric indicates how many unique users saw your social media post?
options: Impressions
Engagement
Reach
Follower count

question: What does 'CTA' stand for in content marketing?
options: Content Traffic Analytics
Campaign Tracking Automation
Call To Action
Click Through Advertising

question: What is 'A/B testing' in digital marketing?
options: Testing two different websites at the same time
Comparing two versions of content to see which performs better
Running ads on two different platforms
A method to block spam traffic

question: When you type something into Google and results appear WITHOUT any ads — those are called what?
options: Paid search results
Organic search results
Sponsored listings
Display results

question: What is a 'long-tail keyword'?
options: A keyword that is very short and generic
A keyword used only in paid ads
A longer, specific phrase with lower competition and clearer intent
A keyword repeated many times on a page

question: In Google Ads, you only pay when someone actually clicks on your ad. What is this pricing model called?
options: Cost Per View (CPV)
Cost Per Impression (CPM)
Cost Per Click (CPC)
Cost Per Lead (CPL)

question: What is the main advantage of SEM (paid ads) over SEO (organic)?
options: SEM results last forever once you stop paying
SEM is always cheaper than SEO
SEM can drive traffic to your site almost immediately
SEM improves your website's organic ranking too

question: What is a 'pre-roll ad' in video marketing?
options: An ad shown at the end of a video
An ad displayed in the sidebar next to a video
An ad that plays before the main video content
A sponsored thumbnail in search results

question: What does CRM stand for in digital marketing?
options: Content Reach Management
Customer Relationship Management
Campaign Revenue Model
Cost Ratio Metric

question: A micro-influencer (5,000–50,000 followers) promoting your product often gives what kind of result?
options: Very poor results because of small audience
High engagement because of niche, loyal followers
Exactly the same result as a celebrity influencer
No measurable result in digital marketing

question: What is a 'target audience' in digital marketing?
options: A specific group of people most likely to be interested in a product or service
All internet users in the world
Only the employees of a company
Only people who follow the brand on social media

question: What does 'organic reach' mean on social media?
options: The number of people who see content without paid promotion
The number of people who see paid advertisements
The number of followers a brand buys
The number of messages sent by the brand

question: What is a keyword in digital marketing?
options: A word or phrase people type into search engines
A password used to log in to websites
A company slogan used in advertisements
A code used to build websites

question: What is the main purpose of creating valuable content online?
options: To attract, educate, and build trust with the audience
To reduce website visitors
To replace marketing campaigns
To gain more social media followers
